raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied species-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied species-ticks within a window contributed by species whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.

species.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct species and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant species.
species.persistentNewActivity: Occupied species-ticks within an origin window contributed by species whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
species.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin species in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
species.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
species.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.

clade.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
clade.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
clade.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
clade.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
clade.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

definition.cladeToSpeciesPersistentWindowFraction: For one seed and survival threshold, clade persistentWindowFraction divided by species persistentWindowFraction. Null when the species fraction is zero.
definition.persistentWindowFractionDelta: For one seed and survival threshold, clade persistentWindowFraction minus species persistentWindowFraction.
definition.cladeToSpeciesPersistentActivityMeanRati: For one seed and survival threshold, clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean divided by species postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean. Null when the species mean is zero.
definition.persistentActivityMeanDelta: For one seed and survival threshold, clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean minus species postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean.
